focus: Co-occurrence and mutual exclusivity detection methods in cancer somatic mutation data

run_metadata.shared_runtime_note: science-tool has no 'literature' subcommand; went direct to OpenAlex + PubMed E-utilities.

query_variants.query: mutual exclusivity cancer somatic mutation detection
co-occurrence mutually exclusive driver mutations pan-cancer
DISCOVER novel somatic alterations cancer mutual exclusivity
FishHook R package Imielinski cancer driver discovery github PMID
Vandin Upfal Raphael "de novo" pathways cancer

ranked_results.title: A novel independence test for somatic alterations in cancer shows that biology drives mutual exclusivity but chance explains most co-occurrence
ranked_results.rationale: Canonical sample-specific-background-rate independence test (Poisson binomial). Directly applicable as null model for cross-study frequency aggregation.

ranked_results.title: Discovering functional evolutionary dependencies in human cancers
ranked_results.rationale: Covariate-aware (lineage, TMB) functional-interaction detection. Correct SELECT citation (Nat Genet 2020, not Cell).
ranked_results.notes: Task brief cited 'Cell 2020'. Method paper is Nat Genet 2020; Mina 2017 Cancer Cell (PMID 28756993) is the conceptual precursor.

ranked_results.title: Insertions and Deletions Target Lineage-Defining Genes in Human Cancers
ranked_results.rationale: Introduces Gamma-Poisson regression framework (FishHook R package) for covariate-aware background-rate-corrected mutation recurrence detection.

ranked_results.title: WeSME: uncovering mutual exclusivity of cancer drivers and beyond
ranked_results.rationale: Weighted-sampling permutation null that preserves per-sample mutation rates; tractable alternative to DISCOVER.

ranked_results.title: CoMEt: a statistical approach to identify combinations of mutually exclusive alterations in cancer
ranked_results.rationale: Exact tail-enumeration test for sets (not just pairs) of mutually exclusive alterations; supports subtype-specific testing.

ranked_results.title: Mutual exclusivity analysis identifies oncogenic network modules
ranked_results.rationale: Seminal statistical + network-module approach; field benchmark (743 citations).

ranked_results.title: De novo discovery of mutated driver pathways in cancer
ranked_results.rationale: Coverage-exclusivity weight function + MCMC / greedy pathway discovery without prior pathway database.

ranked_results.title: Simultaneous Identification of Multiple Driver Pathways in Cancer
ranked_results.rationale: Extends Dendrix to joint discovery of multiple driver pathways.

ranked_results.title: Systematic identification of cancer driving signaling pathways based on mutual exclusivity of genomic alterations
ranked_results.rationale: Pathway-aware mutual-exclusivity detection with curated signaling-network prior.

ranked_results.title: MEGSA: A Powerful and Flexible Framework for Analyzing Mutual Exclusivity of Tumor Mutations
ranked_results.rationale: Likelihood-ratio framework with explicit power comparisons against CoMEt/MEMo/muex; useful design reference for benchmark.

ranked_results.title: TiMEx: a waiting time model for mutually exclusive cancer alterations
ranked_results.rationale: Generative waiting-time (evolutionary) model interpretation of exclusivity.

ranked_results.title: A weighted exact test for mutually exclusive mutations in cancer
ranked_results.rationale: Weighted-exact-test extension bridging WeSME-style weighting with CoMEt-style exact testing.

ranked_results.title: MEMCover: integrated analysis of mutual exclusivity and functional network reveals dysregulated pathways across multiple cancer types
ranked_results.rationale: Cross-cancer-type integration of mutual-exclusivity modules — closest prior art to cbioportal's cross-study aggregation goal.

ranked_results.title: Conditional Selection of Genomic Alterations Dictates Cancer Evolution and Oncogenic Dependencies
ranked_results.rationale: Conceptual precursor to SELECT; introduces conditional-selection framing.

ranked_results.title: Identifying Epistasis in Cancer Genomes: A Delicate Affair
ranked_results.rationale: Perspective / methodological critique documenting failure modes of pan-cancer co-occurrence methods. Required reading before claiming any cross-study co-occurrence result.

ranked_results.title: Epistasis and evolutionary dependencies in human cancers
ranked_results.rationale: 2022 topical review — compact current framing of the problem.

ranked_results.title: OMEN: network-based driver gene identification using mutual exclusivity
ranked_results.rationale: 2022 network-based method; low citation count; monitor.

ranked_results.title: Adaptation of a mutual exclusivity framework to identify driver mutations within oncogenic pathways
ranked_results.rationale: 2024 adaptation layered on DISCOVER/MEGSA-style frameworks; relevant for oncogenic-pathway prior integration.

ranked_results.title: A latent variable model for evaluating mutual exclusivity and co-occurrence between driver mutations in cancer
ranked_results.rationale: 2024 preprint — latent-variable model; monitor for peer-reviewed version.

ranked_results.title: A pathway-informed mutual exclusivity framework to detect genetic interactions in pediatric cancer
ranked_results.rationale: 2025 pathway-prior design pattern on small cohorts (relevant for cbioportal's rarer cancer types).

coverage_gaps: No recent (2022-2026) comprehensive benchmark of mutual-exclusivity methods on a standardized test set.
Cross-study (not cross-cancer-type) aggregation of co-occurrence p-values is essentially absent from the literature — potential contribution target.
Clonal-hematopoiesis confounding not systematically addressed in DISCOVER/SELECT/WeSME/CoMEt.
Panel-heterogeneity (GENIE vs MSK-IMPACT vs WES) not explicitly handled in most methods; only FishHook-style covariate regression + WExT/WeSME weighting address this.
Copy-number / structural-variant co-occurrence methods not reviewed (explicit out-of-scope for this project phase).
recommended_next_actions: Create paper stubs under doc/background/papers/ for the 6 Core-now anchors (done in this pass).
Add BibTeX entries to papers/references.bib for all 20 records (done in this pass).
Pre-register choice between DISCOVER and WeSME as primary null model before implementing create_cooccurrence_matrices.py.
Run follow-up search: 'cross-study / cross-cohort meta-analysis statistics for gene-pair mutation frequencies'.
